locator.quote: structural mismatch between stateful rollout and stateless PPO update

text: The KL explosion is caused by a structural mismatch between stateful rollout (carried hidden_state) and the stateless PPO update (zero-init).

locator.quote: the strongest single correlation in the matched dataset

text: KL grows with episode index (Spearman +0.435, the strongest single correlation in the matched dataset) — the mismatch accumulates as the policy drifts.
